name: DSA Java 17
postStartCommand: bash -lc "mkdir -p /home/vscode/.ssh && chmod 700 /home/vscode/.ssh && if [ -d /home/vscode/.ssh-host ]; then cp -r /home/vscode/.ssh-host/. /home/vscode/.ssh/; fi && find /home/vscode/.ssh -maxdepth 1 -type f -name '*.pub' -exec chmod 644 {} ';' && for f in /home/vscode/.ssh/known_hosts /home/vscode/.ssh/known_hosts.old; do if [ -f $f ]; then chmod 644 $f; fi; done && find /home/vscode/.ssh -maxdepth 1 -type f ! -name '*.pub' ! -name 'known_hosts' ! -name 'known_hosts.old' -exec chmod 600 {} ';'"
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq fzf && sudo wget -qO /usr/local/bin/yq https://github.com/mikefarah/yq/releases/latest/download/yq_linux_amd64 && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/yq && echo 'Dev container ready. cd into any Ex*_project folder and run: mvn compile / mvn test'
